title: primula × variabilis subsp. brevistyla
intro: Primula × variabilis subsp. brevistyla, also known as the variable primrose or primula, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the primrose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of primula × variabilis subsp. brevistyla is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
